query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A woman with shoulder-length blonde hair stands on a subway platform facing away from the camera, wearing a white sleeveless shirt with red lettering on the back, a dark patterned skirt, and carrying a red handbag at her side. A yellow and white commuter train passes beside her.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A woman stands on a subway platform with her back to the camera, wearing a white sleeveless shirt with red lettering, a dark patterned skirt, and carrying a red handbag. A yellow and white commuter train streaks past her with extreme horizontal motion blur obscuring the windows and interior. The image exhibits analog degradation including VHS-style scanlines, tracking errors, and a cyan-yellow distortion band across the top, as well as chromatic aberration fringing along high-contrast edges.
